overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban market at night during light rain. The player character moves through neon-lit food stalls, past vending machines, along narrow industrial alleyways with warm lighting, and approaches additional vendor areas. The footage exhibits high-quality ray-traced lighting with characteristic teal and magenta neon reflections on wet surfaces, clearly from a game engine (Cyberpunk 2077).

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk food market with neon grill stalls

events.description: camera moves past the first food vendor and begins turning slightly toward the right

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered market area, passing closely by a neon-lit food stall with a vendor preparing food

notable_agents.action: food vendor in white shirt and cap standing behind a glowing red grill stall

entered.detail: red neon-lit food cart with glowing grill surface and cooking equipment
multiple hanging digital advertisement screens displaying colorful graphics
metal roof structure providing partial cover over the market walkway
long dark counter with stools and a second vendor visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk market with heavy rain visible beyond the canopy. A food vendor stands behind a bright red neon grill stall directly ahead. The camera moves forward past the vendor, revealing overhead digital signage and a bar area to the left. The wet pavement reflects the teal and red neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with automated vending machines and scattered debris

events.description: exits the covered market canopy into an open plaza exposed to rain
passing from bright neon vending area into darker section with warm wall lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area, passing rows of vending machines on the right side

entered.detail: cluster of bright red and white automated vending machines with glowing product displays
debris and paper trash scattered across the wet reflective ground surface
small glowing pink cylindrical marker lights lining the path

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered market into an open plaza exposed to light rain. Bright red vending machines line the right side, glowing against the dark surroundings. The ground is littered with scattered papers and debris. As the camera moves forward, the scene transitions from bright neon lighting to a darker area with warm yellow wall lights becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alleyway with warm wall-mounted lighting

events.description: enters a narrow passage between tall industrial walls with warm yellow lighting fixtures
slight left turn as the alleyway path curves toward the distant market lights

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow wet alleyway, passing close to a rusted metal wall with warm lighting

entered.detail: tall industrial metal wall with warm yellow light fixtures, rust patches, and peeling posters
faint glow of neon lights and illuminated stalls visible at the end of the dark passage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow enclosed alleyway with a tall rusted metal wall on the right featuring warm yellow industrial lights. The path is darker and more confined than the previous plaza, with scattered debris visible on the wet ground. Distant neon lights from another market area become visible ahead as the path curves slightly to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market area with food carts and outdoor bar seating

events.description: emerges from the narrow alley into a lit market area with food stalls and bar counters
slows slightly while approaching a blue food cart with an orange umbrella

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking past food vendor stalls in an open market area, moving toward a blue food cart

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a blue food cart with an orange and white umbrella, preparing food

entered.detail: small mobile food cart with blue panels, orange umbrella, and warm interior lighting
long counter with green stools under bright white fluorescent lighting
tall red vertical neon sign mounted on a dark building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark alley into another open market area with active food vendors. A blue food cart with an orange umbrella becomes the focal point ahead, while an outdoor bar with bright white lighting occupies the left side. The ground remains wet with scattered debris, and a tall red vertical neon sign is visible on the right. The camera approaches the food cart vendor as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, transitioning from a vibrant covered market into a dark industrial alley before emerging into a second open plaza. It begins by gliding past a red neon grill stall and a bar area under a protective canopy, where teal and red lights reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera emerges from the cover into the light rain, the scene opens into a plaza lined with glowing red vending machines and scattered debris before the lighting shifts from bright neon to the warm yellow glow of distant wall lamps. The path then narrows into a confined alleyway flanked by a rusted metal wall and industrial lighting, moving through the shadows until the route curves slightly to the left. Finally, the camera breaks out of the darkness into another active market area, passing a white-lit outdoor bar and a tall red neon sign to approach a blue food cart under an orange umbrella.
